title: FoxFury PvP Pack
description: A fun fox-themed pvp texture pack! Hope u like it but its in beta so it has a LOOONG way 2 go!
body:
This is my very first mini texture pack for Minecraft! It doesn't have much content right now, as it is still in beta, but a ton more is left to come! Stay tuned and sub to Rockninja32 on YouTube!

IMPORTANT:Usage Terms

You are free to download and use this texture pack solely for personal use in Minecraft.

Redistribution or modification of this texture pack in any form, including commercial use, is strictly prohibited without permission from me.

You may not claim this texture pack as your own or distribute it on any platform without permission.

By using this texture pack, you agree to these terms.
